description: Generate NACA 0012 and NACA 4412 airfoils in QBlade. Perform an XFoil direct analysis on both airfoils using Reynolds number 500,000, Mach 0, and an alpha range from -5 to 15 with a step of 0.5 or 1.0. Save the complete project file containing both airfoils and their polar data to /home/ga/Documents/projects/airfoil_comparison.wpa.
